---
name: Source Request
about: Suggest a new museum, archive, or image source
labels: new-source
---

**Source name**
e.g. National Gallery of Art

**Website**
e.g. https://www.nga.gov

**API documentation (if known)**
Link to the API docs.

**What kind of content?**
e.g. paintings, photographs, manuscripts, nature observations

**Is an API key required?**
Yes / No / Unknown
